about.title: About — Max Grossman: Designer and Maker of Fine Furniture
paragraphs: Max Grossman is a furniture designer/maker and graduate of the Rochester Institute of Technology’s School of American Crafts. His work has been shown for display in the 2014 CIAS Honors Show as well as Gallery R and the Vignelli Center in Rochester NY. Max’s passion for woodworking began at the New Jersey Y Camps, where he designed and built stage sets. Max continues to refine his skills in the craft while sharing his knowledge to the next generation as the woodshop teacher at West Orange High School in West Orange NJ where he resides.

His work focuses primarily on designing dynamic pieces that creatively mix wood and metal. He draws inspiration from the industrial surroundings and machinery that people in modern society use to function. Always up for a challenge, Max enjoys the process of figuring out how to create jigs and fixtures for parts, and how they will best fit into his final product. This plays well into his dislike for right angles and his passion to use asymmetry, angles and curved elements in his work.

He seeks to build furniture that is both aesthetically pleasing and comfortable. Max likes going against the tide, especially when it comes to his efforts to create and build furniture that is sustainable and can be treasured by individuals and families for years to come. He believes that today’s society focuses too much on disposable and boring "flat pack" furniture that degrades quickly and provides a poor user experience. Max creates furniture than can be lived in, take some abuse, and still look great. His pieces can stand up to wear and tear, and can be easily moved around and used to suit the changing needs of any household.

On top of furniture Max specializes in designing and building custom built ins and details that can set a home apart from the crowd and give a truly custom experience to the owners. Max produces furniture and general carpentry projects out of his shop in West Orange to the surrounding towns in Essex County.

new-page-2.metaDesc: Max Grossman is a furniture designer and maker located in West Orange NJ. He creates furniture consisting of wood and metal.
paragraphs: Here you will find a mix of silly shirts, hand made toys, the most ergonomic and comfortable spoons you will ever use, and kits for your kids to assemble and learn about woodworking. In the menu you can see some of the custom work I have done over the years. I am always looking for new and exciting projects so reach out to me in the contact area for custom work or furniture repair.

paragraphs: This bud vase is made for propagation of your favorite flowers. It's designed to fit perfectly on your window sill while letting you see the roots grow from your plant cutting. The narrow opening of the test tube limits evaporation and is easily removable for periodic cleaning. The wood is locally sourced hardwood finished with non toxic mineral oil and bees wax.

shop__bird-house-kit.metaDesc: This Bird House kit contains everything needed to build except the hammer! It features a real cedar shingle roof and the glue is water proof so it will not fall apart in the rain. The wood is unfinished so it can be painted, stained, or simply left to weather outside as you watch birds make their ho
paragraphs: This Bird House kit contains everything needed to build except the hammer! It features a real cedar shingle roof and the glue is water proof so it will not fall apart in the rain. The wood is unfinished so it can be painted, stained, or simply left to weather outside as you watch birds make their home in it year after year!
Please select Medium Flat rate box at shipping.

shop__spoon.title: Hand Carved Spoon — Max Grossman: Designer and Maker of Fine Furniture
shop__spoon.metaDesc: Each Spoon is hand carved and crafted from domestically sourced Walnut, Cherry, or Maple. They are lovingly crafted and shaped to fit ergonomically into your hands.   They are finished in a bath of mineral oil and coated in a layer of bees wax to protect them from boiling pots of water and sauce. Th
paragraphs: Each Spoon is hand carved and crafted from domestically sourced Walnut, Cherry, or Maple. They are lovingly crafted and shaped to fit ergonomically into your hands.
They are finished in a bath of mineral oil and coated in a layer of bees wax to protect them from boiling pots of water and sauce. These spoons will make cooking a joy for years to come!
An annual coating of mineral oil and bees wax will keep these spoons in top shape for years to come! They can be washed with hot soapy water.

shop__tool-box-kit.title: Tool Box Kit — Max Grossman: Designer and Maker of Fine Furniture
shop__tool-box-kit.metaDesc: This Tool Box Kit contains everything needed to build except the hammer! It is sized perfectly for moving tools around your house to fix all those pandemic problems. It can also be used as a drink caddy, craft box or anything else you can think of! The wood is unfinished so it can be painted, staine
paragraphs: This Tool Box Kit contains everything needed to build except the hammer! It is sized perfectly for moving tools around your house to fix all those pandemic problems. It can also be used as a drink caddy, craft box or anything else you can think of! The wood is unfinished so it can be painted, stained, or simply left as is. I made tool boxes of this style when I was a kid in cub scouts and I find that I still use them even with a full shop!
When selecting Shipping Large Flat rate box is required.

shop__toy-camera.title: Toy Camera — Max Grossman: Designer and Maker of Fine Furniture
shop__toy-camera.metaDesc: This toy camera is sure to bring your child hours of fun! The “lens” rotates so they can focus their picture and the hole in the top works as a great view finder! These cameras are coated with non toxic paint and food safe finish.
paragraphs: This toy camera is sure to bring your child hours of fun! The “lens” rotates so they can focus their picture and the hole in the top works as a great view finder! These cameras are coated with non toxic paint and food safe finish.
